WORK EXPERIENCE

ERNST & YOUNG (EY GDS)
Senior Security Consultant
2023 — PRESENT
+
PAM Architect & Onsite Lead
● INVESTMENT BANKING · NEW YORK · 2 YEARS
Embedded onsite in New York as sole PAM Architect and Delivery Lead for a Tier-1 investment bank. Designed end-to-end architectural solutions, led offshore engineering teams, and delivered a multi-platform PAM program covering privileged account governance with CyberArk Core PAM and dynamic secrets with HashiCorp Vault. Pioneered a custom framework for AI Agent credential vaulting — securing machine identities for autonomous systems where no commercial playbook exists.
CyberArk Tech Lead
● HEALTHCARE SECTOR · 1 YEAR
Led PAM Engineering through a full infrastructure modernization. Executed CyberArk upgrades and new component rollouts. Delivered a successful CyberArk SIA POC and production implementation. Designed a Vault server migration and executed a zero-disruption cutover from self-hosted CyberArk to Privilege Cloud.
INFOSYS LIMITED
Associate Consultant
2021 — 2023
+
Delinea Implementation Engineer
● TRANSPORTATION & SHIPPING · 1 YEAR
Solo-architected and delivered a greenfield PAM deployment from a completely blank cyber infrastructure. Designed the full Delinea Secret Server topology including Discovery, Heartbeat, RPC, custom Templates and Launchers. Integrated with the identity ecosystem and completed pilot onboarding across heterogeneous platforms — from Windows endpoints to network appliances.
